computedStyles.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
computedStyles.font-family: "Anthropic Sans", system-ui, "Segoe UI", Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif

cssRules.css: box-sizing: border-box; border-width: 0px; border-style: solid; border-color: var(--cds-border);
box-sizing: border-box; outline-color: hsl(var(--accent-100)); scrollbar-width: thin; scrollbar-color: hsla(var(--border-300) / 35%) transparent;

width: 100%; height: 100%; display: flex; flex-direction: column; min-width: 0px; --df-sidebar-clearance: calc(var(--df-sidebar-width) + 8px); --df-content-gutter: 8px; padding-left: calc(var(--df-sidebar-clearance) + var(--df-content-gutter));
